ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($User.BypassValidationRules__c), RecordType.DeveloperName = "Biography", OR( NOT(ISBLANK(Product__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Project_Contribution_at_Product_level__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(ShareClass__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Strategy__c)), NOT(ISBLANK(Narrative__c)) ) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: The fields Product, Project Contribution at Product level, Narrative, Share Class and Strategy should be empty for Biography records
